title: Bridge Essay: Shaping the bodily self: exploring the influence of early attachment experiences

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body as process not substance — neuroplasticity reveals the self-model as continuously updated prediction.

**Shaping the bodily self: exploring the influence of early attachment experiences on body ownership.**. Psychological research.. PMID: 41885973. DOI: 10.1007/s00426-026-02280-y. Body ownership is commonly studied using the rubber hand illusion (RHI), an experimental paradigm that induces atemporary feeling of owning afake hand. Although the illusion demonstrates that multisensory integration is at the core of body ownership, factors like personality traits also modulate the experience and/or intensity of the illusion in atop-down manner.
